raw_data.description: 8-bit HCS08 microcontroller with 4 KB Flash, 256 bytes RAM, dual 16-bit Timer/PWM modules, 10-bit ADC

parameters.name: Number of Advanced-Control PWM Timers (motor control capable)

conditions.note: TPM1 and TPM2: 16-bit Timer/PWM modules with input capture, output compare, and edge-aligned or center-aligned PWM

parameters.name: Number of Complementary PWM Output Pairs

conditions.note: Two 2-channel Timer/PWM modules with independent channels; not true complementary pairs
VDDA/VREFH and VSSA/VREFL are derived from VDD and VSS respectively
Serial Communication Interface (SCI) with full-duplex NRZ, LIN master/slave support
All modules except ADC active, ICS configured for FBE
All modules except ADC active, ICS configured for FBE
All modules except ADC active, ICS configured for FEI
12 general purpose I/O pins with 8 interrupt pins selectable polarity

raw_data.description: Automotive 120V, 3.7A/4.5A Half-Bridge Driver with 8V UVLO and Enable

conditions.condition_text: Absolute maximum voltage on HB pin

parameters.name: Propagation Delay — Turn-On (Input Low → Output High)

conditions.condition_text: VLI rising to VLO rising, CLOAD = 0 pF, from VHIT of LI to 10% of LO rising
VHI rising to VHO rising, CLOAD = 0 pF, from VHIT of HI to 10% of HO rising

parameters.name: Propagation Delay — Turn-Off (Input High → Output Low)

conditions.condition_text: VLI falling to VLO falling, CLOAD = 0 pF, from VLIT of LI to 90% of LO falling
VHI falling to VHO falling, CLOAD = 0 pF, from VLIT of HI to 90% of HO falling
LO rise time, CLOAD = 1000 pF, from 10% to 90%
HO rise time, CLOAD = 1000 pF, from 10% to 90%
LO fall time, CLOAD = 1000 pF, from 90% to 10%
HO fall time, CLOAD = 1000 pF, from 90% to 10%
VDD quiescent current, VLI = VHI = 0 V, VEN = 3V
Boot voltage quiescent current, VLI = VHI = 0 V, VEN = 3V
Driver current when EN pin is pulled low (Disabled)

raw_data.description: N-channel OptiMOS 6 Power Transistor, 80V, 425A continuous drain current, 0.95 mΩ RDS(on)

conditions.note: Device on 40 mm x 40 mm x 1.5 mm epoxy PCB FR4 with 6 cm² (one layer, 70 µm thick) copper area for drain connection. PCB is vertical in still air.
Defined by design. Not subject to production test.

notes.sw_basis: tr=14.6ns, tf=16.8ns @ fsw=20kHz, Vbus=48.0V — Qgd-based model (Vplateau=4.9V, Rg_int=1.40Ω, t_miller_on=45.7ns, t_miller_off=66.2ns). Simple overlap model would give 0.768W
notes.improvement: Increase fsw reduces motor ripple but increases switching losses

hardcoded.name: TIM resistance (Rth_CS)
hardcoded.reason: Thermal interface material between case and PCB

gate_resistors.bypass_diode_turn_off: 1N4148 or BAT54 in parallel with Rg_off

notes.rg_on_basis: Qg=155.0nC, Vdrv=12.0V, Vth=3.0V, t_rise=40.0ns target, Rg_int=1.4Ω subtracted
notes.rg_off_note: Place Schottky diode antiparallel with Rg_off for asymmetric drive
notes.placement: Mount within 10mm of gate pin, 0402/0603, shortest possible trace
notes.emi_note: dV/dt=1393.5 V/µs — adjust Rg_on if EMI issues arise

hardcoded.name: Rg_bootstrap
hardcoded.reason: Limits peak bootstrap diode charging current

notes.placement_bulk: Within 30mm of H-bridge, low-impedance bus bar
notes.placement_mlcc: One per MOSFET switch node, as close as possible

hardcoded.name: Minimum bulk cap count
hardcoded.reason: Minimum parallel caps for ESR and thermal distribution

hardcoded.name: Bulk cap size
hardcoded.reason: Standard electrolytic value for bus decoupling

hardcoded.name: Typical ESR per cap
hardcoded.reason: Electrolytic ESR estimate for thermal calc

notes.100pct_duty: 100% duty cycle requires external charge pump or VCC regulator
notes.refresh: High-side must turn ON ≥ 20400ns per PWM cycle
notes.derating: Use 25V cap at 12V drive — only 50% voltage derating

hardcoded.name: Bootstrap droop target
hardcoded.reason: Acceptable voltage sag during HS on-time

hardcoded.name: Safety margin
hardcoded.reason: C_boot multiplied by 2.0x before E12 snap

hardcoded.name: Schottky diode Vf
hardcoded.reason: Assumed forward drop for bootstrap diode

single_shunt.location: DC bus low-side return (between GND and bottom FETs)

three_shunt.location: Each phase low-side MOSFET source return

notes.kelvin: MANDATORY 4-wire Kelvin sensing — sense traces inside power traces
notes.jumper: Populate EITHER single shunt OR 3-phase shunts — use 0Ω jumper to select mode

notes.rs_placement: Place Cs physically closest to MOSFET D-S pins
notes.reduce_stray: Reducing PCB stray inductance is more effective than snubbers
notes.pcb_technique: Use mirrored top/bottom copper pours for low-inductance half-bridge

ovp.response: Hardware → disable PWM gate signals within 1µs

uvp.response: Disable gate drive, wait for recovery above hysteresis level

tvs.placement: Across bus capacitors, close to bridge

hardcoded.name: OVP/UVP R1
hardcoded.reason: Fixed top divider resistor for low bias current

vcc_gate_driver.note: Place as close as possible to driver VCC pin

vdd_5v_logic.note: If 5V rail used for level shifting or gate signal logic

vdd_mcu.note: One 100nF per MCU power pin, one bulk per voltage domain (5.5V MCU)

adc_reference.note: Dedicated 100nF + 1µF on VREF pin, shortest possible trace to AGND

notes.decoupling_rule: Every IC power pin needs 100nF within 2mm + bulk 10µF within 10mm
notes.placement: Decoupling caps on same layer as IC — never on opposite side

emi_filter.cm_choke_part: Wurth 744235 or TDK ACM series, rated for DC current

notes.cm_choke_place: At power input connector, before bulk caps
notes.motor_output: Additional RC filter on motor phase outputs reduces bearing currents
notes.pcb_ground: Star ground topology — separate PGND and AGND, single join point

notes.package: D2PAK (TO-263-7) — use thermal slug pad with solder mask opening
notes.vias: 16× 0.3mm drilled, 0.2mm annular ring thermal vias per MOSFET
notes.copper_oz: 3oz L1/L6, thermal slug pads open to both sides
notes.warning: ⚠ CRITICAL: Tj > 150°C — add heatsink or reduce fsw

notes.foc: Dead-time compensation required in firmware for accurate FOC below ~10% mod index
notes.6step: 6-step commutation: enforce same dead-time at each commutation event
notes.comp_algo: Voltage feed-forward or current-sign-based dead-time compensation

hardcoded.name: Absolute margin
hardcoded.reason: Baseline safety margin added to minimum

hardcoded.name: Safety multiplier
hardcoded.reason: Recommended margin over minimum dead time

layer_stack.purpose: Power traces, MOSFET pads, gate traces

pcb_guidelines.shunt_kelvin_trace: Route sense traces INSIDE power trace pair (Kelvin connection)

notes.analog_gnd: AGND star point at ADC VREF, single bridge to PGND
notes.gate_loop: Gate drive loop < 50mm² to minimize Lgate parasitic
notes.bridge_loop: Half-bridge Drain-Source-GND loop < 100mm² for low di/dt
notes.copper_pour: Thermal pour on both L1 and L6 under each MOSFET

warnings: WARNING: Motor copper loss (211.2W) is 7.0% of rated power. Winding thermal limit may be reached. Consider forced cooling.
WARNING: Motor mechanical power (251W = 0.4Nm × 628rad/s) differs from system rating (3000.0W) by 92%. Verify motor specs match design target.
WARNING: 3-channel ADC conversion (7500000.0µs) exceeds available sampling window (2.5µs at 20kHz). Consider DMA+injected channels, reducing fsw, or using simultaneous sampling.

checks.title: Driver vs MOSFET Qg
checks.detail: Gate charge time 42ns is above target 40.0ns but within 2x. Rg_on will be near minimum.
checks.advice: Consider increasing rise time target or using a stronger driver.

checks.title: VCC vs UVLO threshold
checks.detail: VCC 12.0V is 5.0V above UVLO (7.0V). Adequate margin.

checks.title: MCU dead-time vs design
checks.detail: DT resolution 25.0ns, minimum DT 104ns, register=5. Good precision.

checks.title: ADC reference consistency
checks.detail: MCU ADC ref (5.00V) differs from design constant (3.30V) by 52%. Using MCU value in calculations.
checks.advice: Update the ADC reference design constant to match your MCU, or verify the extracted value.

checks.title: Vds vs peak + ringing
checks.detail: Peak + ringing (190V) exceeds Vds_max (80V). Avalanche breakdown risk!
checks.advice: Use higher-voltage MOSFET, reduce stray inductance, or add snubber.

checks.title: V_drive headroom vs Vgs_th
checks.detail: V_drive - Vgs_th = 9.0V headroom. MOSFET will fully enhance.

checks.title: Driver thermal shutdown margin
checks.detail: Thermal shutdown not extracted. Driver Tj estimated at 36C.

checks.title: MCU PWM resolution at fsw
checks.detail: 10.0 effective bits at 20kHz. Acceptable but limits current ripple control.
checks.advice: 10+ bits recommended for smooth FOC operation.

checks.title: MCU complementary outputs
checks.detail: MCU has 0 complementary pairs, need >=3 for 3-phase inverter.
checks.advice: Use MCU with 3+ complementary PWM outputs (e.g., STM32 TIM1/TIM8).

checks.title: System thermal budget
checks.detail: Thermal budget 45% remaining. Tj~109C from conduction alone (max 175C).

waveform.model_note: Analytical 4-region MOSFET switching model. Assumes linear Ciss/Cgd, constant load current, and ideal gate driver current limiting. Waveform shapes and timing are representative — for exact behavior, validate with oscilloscope measurement.

audit_log: [MOSFET] Applied 1.5x thermal multiplier for Rds(on) at estimated ~100°C junction.
[MOSFET] Using Qgd-based switching loss: Vplateau=4.9V, Ig_on=0.63A, Ig_off=0.44A, t_miller_on=45.7ns, t_miller_off=66.2ns. P_sw=2.737W vs overlap=0.768W.
[MOSFET] Using Qoss=319nC from datasheet for output capacitance loss.
[Thermal] Used TIM: 0.5°C/W, PCB-to-ambient: 20.0°C/W.
[Gate Drive] Accounted for Rg_int=1.4Ω from MOSFET datasheet. Rg_ext = Rg_total - Rg_int.
[Gate Drive] Bootstrap gate resistor (Rg_boot) = 10.0Ω.
[DC Bus] Hardcoded standard decoupling: 50mΩ ESR per electrolytic, 4.7µF film, 100nF MLCC.
[Bootstrap] Series bootstrap resistor = 10.0Ω.
[Current Sensing] Using ADC reference 5.0V from MCU datasheet.
[Current Sensing] Assumed 5.0V ADC with 2.5V bias target for bidirectional FOC.
[Snubber] Stray layout inductance missing. Assumed 10.0nH default.
[Snubber] Targeted critical damping factor (ζ = 1) for switching overshoot resistor calculation.
[Snubber] Qoss=319nC from datasheet. E_oss=9.6µJ, E_snub=21.6µJ.
[Protection] Using ADC reference 5.0V from MCU datasheet.
[Protection] Hardcoded TVS power rating to 600W (SMBJ/P6KE style) for bus clamping.
[Power Supply] Assumed 10µF bulk and 100nF bypass logic decoupling capacitors across all ICs.
[Power Supply] Using extracted MCU VDD = 5.5V for bypass sizing.
[EMI] Hardcoded baseline CM choke (330µH), X-cap (100nF), and Y-cap (4.7nF) for conducted emissions filtering.
[Thermal] Driver IC: P=0.124W, Rth_ja=51.9°C/W, Tj_est=36°C.
[Dead Time] Added 20.0ns absolute margin and 1.5x safety margin to switching times.
[Dead Time] Included driver output fall time (5.5ns) in dead-time budget.
[Motor] PWM frequency ratio f_sw/f_e = 28.6x — OK (>= 10x).
[Motor] WARNING: Copper loss is 7.0% of rated power (211.2W / 3000.0W).
[Motor] WARNING: Power mismatch — motor yields 251W vs system 3000.0W (92% diff).
[MOSFET Rating] Vds_max=80.0V vs V_peak=60.0V — OK (25% margin).
[MOSFET Rating] Id_cont=425.0A vs I_max=80.0A — OK (81% margin).
[Driver] VCC range [12.0-100V] includes V_drv=12.0V — OK.
[Driver] Bootstrap: Vboot=11.0V vs UVLO=6.7V — OK (4.3V margin).
[Driver] Logic levels: MCU Voh=5.5V ≥ VIH=2.3V — OK.
[ADC Timing] ADC conversion time = 2500000.0µs (from datasheet unit: 'μs').
[ADC Timing] WARNING: 3-ch conversion (7500000.0µs) > window (2.5µs).
[ADC Timing] 8 ADC channels available, need ≥7 — OK.
[Cross-Check] WARNING: Driver vs MOSFET Qg -- Gate charge time 42ns is above target 40.0ns but within 2x. Rg_on will be near minimum.
[Cross-Check] OK: Bootstrap vs VBS max -- Bootstrap 11.0V vs VBS_max 120.0V -- 91% margin.
[Cross-Check] OK: VCC vs UVLO threshold -- VCC 12.0V is 5.0V above UVLO (7.0V). Adequate margin.
[Cross-Check] OK: MCU dead-time vs design -- DT resolution 25.0ns, minimum DT 104ns, register=5. Good precision.
[Cross-Check] WARNING: ADC reference consistency -- MCU ADC ref (5.00V) differs from design constant (3.30V) by 52%. Using MCU value in calculations.
[Cross-Check] FAIL: Vds vs peak + ringing -- Peak + ringing (190V) exceeds Vds_max (80V). Avalanche breakdown risk!
[Cross-Check] OK: Gate drive vs Vgs max -- Vgs_max=20V, V_drive=12.0V -- 40% headroom.
[Cross-Check] OK: V_drive headroom vs Vgs_th -- V_drive - Vgs_th = 9.0V headroom. MOSFET will fully enhance.
[Cross-Check] SKIP: Driver thermal shutdown margin -- Thermal shutdown not extracted. Driver Tj estimated at 36C.
[Cross-Check] WARNING: MCU PWM resolution at fsw -- 10.0 effective bits at 20kHz. Acceptable but limits current ripple control.
[Cross-Check] FAIL: MCU complementary outputs -- MCU has 0 complementary pairs, need >=3 for 3-phase inverter.
[Cross-Check] OK: System thermal budget -- Thermal budget 45% remaining. Tj~109C from conduction alone (max 175C).
[Waveform] Generated switching waveform: turn-on=132ns, Miller=10ns, turn-off=287ns, dead-time=480ns.
